rewards.description:
Marbles on Stream is the most welcoming stream interactive experience where a streamer can run the game and welcome anyone in their chat to participate with "!play". That's it!

Join in for exclusive prizes and keep an eye on our for how we evolve this event in the future. If you need assistance please join our discord. Discord.gg/pixelbypixelstudios

rewards.description:
Celebrate Mother’s Day with our special Mother’s Day Drops event! 🌸💖 From May 8 – 11, tune in and earn exclusive rewards just for watching your favorite streams. 

The longer you watch, the better the rewards: 
• 1 Hour – 10,000 Tickets 
• 3 Hours – Heartwarming Mother & Child Coin 
• 6 Hours – Happy Mother’s Day Celebration Coin 
• 9 Hours – Beautiful Mother’s Day Flower Basket Coin 
• 12 Hours – 50,000 Tickets 

Each reward features vibrant collectible artwork with glowing details, elegant spring colors, and premium finishes—perfect for showing off in-game. 

Don’t miss your chance to collect them all! These limited-time drops are only available during the event, so join the celebration, watch your favorite creators, and earn amazing rewards before they’re gone. 🌷✨
rewards.name: Mothers Day Drops

rewards.description: To celebrate the launch of Phasmophobia's Player Character Update, earn this exclusive Twitch Drop t-shirt from watching your favourite Phasmophobia creators.

rewards.description:
Celebrate Ape Squad Classics and earn this unique Twitch Drop as you cheer your favorite team to Victory!
Across EU and NA, 80 teams clash to determine who will rise to the challenge and make it all the way to THE FINALS.
rewards.name: Ape Squad Classics

rewards.description:
DRAGON'S CLAIM IS HERE! 
The Mid-Season Update unleashes a brand-new 5v5 LTM where control, teamplay & siege tactics rule. Plant the banner, hold the zone, stack cash. Do watch the skies though, A fire-breathing Dragon is hunting the banner-bearers. Spin the Scales of Fortune for 20+ free rewards, gear up with the Helion Exarch Set, and claim the crown that remains. Tune in, watch, and earn exclusive Twitch Drops!
rewards.name: DRAGON'S CLAIM

rewards.description: The Division Resurgence - WW Release - Twitch Drops. rewards.name: TDR - WW PC Release

rewards.description: To celebrate the ABI Anniversary Event and in response to popular demand, we are bringing back 9 streamer stickers from the past seasons. Viewers will be rewarded for gifting subscriptions to these eligible streamers in the Arena Breakout: Infinite (ABI) category: ImOw, GL40LabsRaT, HITBOXKING, Arven93, LVNDMARK, QuattroAce, Kritikal, BakedJake, Ralisco. Support your favorite eligible streamers and receive the exclusive Stickers! Note that Viewers who had claimed any of these streamer stickers before S5 cannot re-claim the same stickers this time, and subscriptions will only count toward the event task if gifted while the streamer is live and broadcasting ABI content. Please link your Level Infinite Pass account and Twitch Account on the event page https://www.arenabreakoutinfinite.com/twitchdrops , and claim your Drops rewards in time.
rewards.name: S5 Support ABI Partners
